note: 5 combat tricks (Rite/instant, pakai op BUFF) → set 185. Memanfaatkan instant-speed.

cards.name: Feral Vigor
cards.text: Give target Unit +2/+3 until end of turn.
cards.flavor: The Grove lends its strength to those who stand for it — briefly, and completely.

cards.name: Reckless Charge
cards.text: Give target Unit +4/+0 until end of turn.
cards.flavor: Ashmar has a word for caution. It is rarely used, and never twice.

cards.name: Fluid Guard
cards.text: Give target Unit +0/+4 until end of turn. Draw a card.
cards.flavor: Water cannot be cut. Only briefly inconvenienced.

cards.name: Radiant Ward
cards.text: Give target Unit +1/+3 until end of turn. Restore 2 Health to you.
cards.flavor: The dawn shields first, and asks its questions never.

cards.name: Cruel Empowerment
cards.text: Give target Unit +3/+1 until end of turn.
cards.flavor: The Hollow's gifts always fit. That is the frightening part.
